pkgmetadata.longdescription: Welcome to django-rest-auth.. image httpstravis-ci.orgTivixdjango-rest-auth.svg target httpstravis-ci.orgTivixdjango-rest-auth.. image httpscoveralls.ioreposTivixdjango-rest-authbadge.svg target httpscoveralls.iorTivixdjango-rest-authbranchmaster.. image httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsdjango-rest-authbadgeversionlatest target httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsdjango-rest-authbadgelatestDjango-rest-auth provides a set of REST API endpoints for Authentication and RegistrationDocumentation-------------httpdjango-rest-auth.readthedocs.orgenlatestSource code-----------httpsgithub.comTivixdjango-rest-authStack Overflow-----------httpstackoverflow.comquestionstaggeddjango-rest-auth
